summary: Frontend testing completed for multiple new pages, navigation dropdowns, and footer enhancements. All 12 requested features verified successfully.
passed_tests: 1. Navigation dropdown menus work - Diensten dropdown with hover interaction ✓
2. Navigation dropdown menus work - Over dropdown with hover interaction ✓
3. Diensten dropdown shows: Webdesign, Webflow, Branding, Website voor Coaches, Website voor ZZP'ers, Alle Diensten ✓
4. Over dropdown shows: Over Mij, Waarom een Website?, Onderhoud & Hosting, Blog ✓
5. Route /over-mij loads OverMijPage with 'Mensen kopen van mensen' heading, Yvar intro, Mijn Aanpak section ✓
6. Route /onderhoud loads OnderhoudPage with €25/maand pricing, Hosting, Security, Backups features ✓
7. Route /diensten loads DienstenPage overview with 3 services + 2 niche links ✓
8. Route /diensten/webdesign loads Webdesign service page with €500 price ✓
9. Route /diensten/webflow loads Webflow service page with €900 price ✓
10. Route /diensten/branding loads Branding service page with €300 price ✓
11. Route /voor/coaches loads Coaches niche page with benefits list ✓
12. Route /voor/zzp loads ZZP niche page with benefits list ✓
13. Footer Diensten column has: Webdesign, Webflow, Branding, Onderhoud links ✓
14. Footer Websites voor column has: Coaches, ZZP'ers links ✓
15. Footer Pagina's column has: Pakketten, Calculator, Over Mij, Waarom?, Blog links ✓
16. DemoPreview component still works - tab switching between Basis, Pro, Premium ✓
17. DemoPreview shows correct URL in browser frame: basispakket.nl, propakket.nl, premiumpakket.nl ✓
critical_code_review_comments: Navigation dropdowns use framer-motion AnimatePresence for smooth animations
Dropdown menus use onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave for hover-based interaction - good UX pattern
All new pages follow consistent layout with nav, hero section, content, and footer
Footer has proper 5-column layout: Logo/Info, Diensten, Websites voor, Pagina's, Contact
DienstenPage.jsx handles 3 route patterns: /diensten, /diensten/:type, /voor/:niche using useParams
All pages include SEO component for proper meta tags
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new pages and navigation features from this iteration are working correctly. Navigation has dropdown menus for 'Diensten' and 'Over'. Footer has 5 columns with links to all new pages. Routes tested: /over-mij, /onderhoud, /diensten, /diensten/webdesign, /diensten/webflow, /diensten/branding, /voor/coaches, /voor/zzp. DemoPreview tab switching continues to work with Basis/Pro/Premium demos.

verified_routes./over-mij: OverMijPage - About Me page with Yvar intro, values (Mijn Aanpak), timeline (Mijn Verhaal)
verified_routes./onderhoud: OnderhoudPage - Maintenance page with €25/maand, features list, comparison table
verified_routes./diensten: DienstenPage overview - Shows 3 services (Webdesign, Webflow, Branding) + 2 niches (Coaches, ZZP)
verified_routes./diensten/webflow: Service page - Webflow Development features, €900 price
verified_routes./voor/coaches: Niche page - Website voor Coaches with benefits list
verified_routes./voor/zzp: Niche page - Website voor ZZP'ers with benefits list
